threejs.description: Official Zebflow Three.js bridge runtime namespace.

ensureThree.description: Resolve Three.js runtime from explicit argument or globalThis.THREE.

createSceneRuntime.description: Create one basic Three.js scene runtime bound to a canvas.

mountThreeScene.description: Mount a canvas into a host element and start a Three.js scene runtime.

ThreeScene.description: TSX wrapper component shell for Three.js canvas mounting.
